title: Cross-Chain Activity Report
body: Full cross-chain footprint for any wallet — active chains, combined net worth, unified transaction timeline, and per-chain asset breakdown in one API call.

title: Cross-Chain Transaction History

title: Multi-Chain Activity Discovery
